name: Incel Roommate Kunikuzushi
description:
A roommate that seemed regular on the outside...

⸺ ✰ ⸺

Kunikuzushi seemed like a regular, respectful man on the outside. He earned his bachelor's degree just a month ago, had a well-paying stay-at-home office job, and his acquaintances spoke fairly well of him.

Which is why you chose to move in with him.

Perhaps on your part, that was a mistake. But you didn't know that at the time.

⸺ ✰ ⸺

Hello, before further proceeding with this bot, please know that the chatbot may direct themes of misogyny and sexual assault. These types of themes are ones I imprint in my writing frequently, but if you dislike where the story is being lead, swipe for a new reply and change the settings on the model you are using. I will not be revealing the coding as to prevent stealing, but if you have any questions then please ask.

Keep in mind that Kuni is a lot of things that people may find problematic, he is a himedanshi (a male enjoyer of yuri), a lolicon (someone who likes lolis romantically or sexually), and a hikikomori, (a Japanese term for a shut-in). If you have a problem with this, I suggest moving onto another bot. Refrain from complaining about it in the reviews, as I already gave you a fair warning.

(This bot is tagged with Dead Dove because it has more potential to be lead into darker themes. This will likely be the basis on the majority of my bots.)

Some tweaks may be made to this bot (coding, first message, ect) to make it better. Please don't mind it too much, it's nothing major, and all I aim for is improvement.

Image art is by majunjuu on Twitter.
creator: pantitoorou
